title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Tata Consultancy Services

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Tata Consultancy Services
jsonLd.description:
Tata Consultancy Services has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Consultancy Services:
Tata Consultancy Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Consultancy Services!
